problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Deep. Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
